general: ami vebechilam jibon ta shoja kintu shomoy gele bujhte parlam shoja kichu na
himu bole shob rastay ekdin mishti kichhu pawa jay jodi tumi khujte jano
misir ali bollen manusher mon ekta ajob jinish jeta kono theory te bujhanoa jay na
boi porte boshe ami vule jai bairer duniya ta ar nijer shathe thaki shudhu
raat birate jokhhon shob chup thake tokhon nijer shathe prochur kotha bola jay
notun diner shuru ta shobshomoy ekta notun shopner moto mone hoy amaar
shomay gele bujha jay kon khane ami vul korechilam ar ki shikhe nilam
Dhaker purano golite amar bachpan er dingulo aaj o shopner moto mone pore
jibon er protita muhurt kono na kono shikkha dey jodi tumi shikhe nite jano
ekta choto akasher niche darie thaka o onek boro anubhuti hoy amar
ami chhoto belay jeto ei shob jaygay aaj shudhui smriti ar kichu na
manush er shathe manusher je dura thakee ta shomay diye komey na bade
golper boi te amar moto manush er jiboner kotha pawa jay niromoy
shilaidaha te bose Rabindranath jokhon likhechilen shetar shuad aaj o ache
rater nirabote chinta gulo vore othe ar ghumate parlam na ektu o
Humayun Ahmed er boi gulo amar kache boro bondhu er moto chiro kaler
ekta bhalolagar kono karon lagey na shudhu ektu mon valo thakley hoy
boro shahor er moddhe o manush ekaki thake ja chhotoy shombhob chilo na
poth harano manush der o ekdin thikana pawa jay shudhu shopno rekhe jete hoy
amar chheler naam rakhte giye rabindranather kobitar katha mone porschilo
jibon er onek gondogol aachey kintu shei gondogole o shundor kichu ache
tumi chinta koro amaar jonno ta ami jani tumi na bolle o ami bujhi
akasher neel rang dekhe mone hoy prokriti ta aar manush ke valo chena ache
ami janina amar jibon kothay jabe kintu ami jani ami thakbo shobshomoy
ekdin shob manush bujhte parbe je jibon ta khub chhoto tai valo thaka dorkar
office: ami ajke office e late esechi
boss ajke khub serious mood e
release date ajke push hoye gelo
meeting ta cancel hoye gelo last minute e
ami chai lunch break e ghore jaite
project deadline kal kintu kono kaj hoy nai
client er feedback ta completely ulta
stand up meeting e boro kore mitha bolsi
server down hoye gese production e
keo chai na weekend e kaj korte
amader team ta khub bhalo kaj kore
design review e sobai agree korlona
code review comments dite boss bhule geche
deployment script ta kaj korche na akhon
database backup neowa hoy nai onek din
new feature request esecho again client er theke
bug ta khuje pawa jacche na kono vabe
ami aaj office e first time on time eseci
test case gulo pass korche na ekta o
documentation likhte hobe sesh e sob kichu shesh hoile
meeting er por meeting sesh hoi na kono din
wifi speed ta aaj khub slow lagche
laptop ta hang korche boro file khulte gele
product manager er email ta bujhte parcina
aaj raat 12 tar age jete parbo na bari
sprint planning e estimated time ta fele disi
ami vebecilam kal deploy korbo kintu parini
CI CD pipeline ta fail korche boro ei
QA team ta bug report diache 20 ta naey
ami janina keno ei error ta ashe akhono
food: shorshe ilish diye goromer bhat khaoa bangalir shobchheye boro anondo
eid er din biryani na khaile eid ta shompurno hoy na amader kache
deshi murgi diye ranna kora mangshor jhol er sathe goromer bhat ashadharon
kachokolar torkari ar dal diye bhat amader gram banglar shada ar shudhur ranna
puran Dhakar bakarkhani ar cha diye shokal shuru korar kono tulona hoyna
panta bhat ar shorshe ilish diye poila boishakher subho shuru korbo abar
amader desher mishti doi er sathe kono mishti er tulona cholena duniyay
hilsha macher paturi te kolapata diye dhuye ranna kora gram banglar shuad
boro boro golap jaam ar roshgolla amader utshober priya mishtir naam
Dhakar fuchka ar chotpoti khaoya mane shororsher mela te beriye pora
shobji bhaji ar dal diye ekta shada khana amader shorir ke shushto rakhte pare
narikel naru ar moa bangalir ghore ghore banaano chirokaler mishti pithe
nobanno utsobe notun dhaner chira ar dudh diye pithe banano hoy gram jurey
gacher taja aam diye makha aam ar kacha lonka diye bhat khaoa ashadharon
shutki maacher torkari amader gram banglar bishesh ranna jar gon kora shesh hoy na
dim bhaji ar ruti diye shokal er nashta ta kore din shuru kori amar moto
begun bhaja ar dal diye shada bhat er sathe shob kichu theke valo lage
amader gramer kalai er dal er bara er moto shad aar kothaw paoa jabe na
rui macher jhol er gandho bari vore gele bujhte pari ma ranna korchen
aam doodh mishiye khawa ta bangalir gram banglar ekta poribarer mishti obbhash

amar shopno ta tomar kachhe chhoto holeo amar kachhe ta onek boro
brishti te bheyo na bhoy peo na alo ashbe ekdin thik thikao shobshomoy
agiye jao agiye jao boro poth chhoto poth shob poth dhore agiye jao
jibon jokhon koshto dey tokhon bojha jay jibon ta koto shundor chilo
tumi shakto hobe tomar shomosha gulo tomar shakti dekhiye debe tomake
Nazrul bole jai jago jai jago nidristo er shei din shesh hoye gechhe
Jibonananda likhechen shob pakhi ghore phire ashey shudhu ami phiri na
shopno dekha bondo koro na karon shopno dekha ta jibon er shuruate thake
haar na mana manush e keu mara jay na thik thak heshel khojle paoa jay
tumi joto cheshta koro toto tomar jibon ta shundor hoye uthbe dhire dhire

vul hole vul mene nao ar notun kore shuru koro jibon ta shesh hoy ni to
nij er upore bishwash rakho karon tumi na thakle tomar kono poth nei
boro manush ra khub kaaj kore chup chhap ar chhoto manush ra shudhu kotha bole
